notes: Comes with 8MB PSRAM, suitable for large memory applications. USB-OTG can directly emulate keyboard/mouse/USB drive. Onboard RGB LED

onboard_peripherals.name: RGB LED (WS2812)
onboard_peripherals.notes: Programmable RGB LED. GPIO48 can be freed when not in use

onboard_peripherals.name: BOOT Button
onboard_peripherals.notes: Boot button, pulls GPIO0 low when pressed. Cannot be used for other functions

notes: All I2C/SPI/UART can be remapped to any free GPIO via GPIO Matrix
GPIO 0 is a strapping pin (Boot button), cannot change function
GPIO 3 is JTAG strapping, recommended to keep
GPIO 45/46 are strapping pins, affect startup voltage
GPIO 26-32 are occupied by Octal PSRAM (WROOM-1 module), cannot be used externally
GPIO 19/20 are dedicated to USB OTG; using them as regular GPIO will lose USB functionality
ADC2 conflicts with WiFi, prefer ADC1 (GPIO 1-10)
